title: Symantec ProxySG Test Validation Failure
descriptionMarkdown: This Syslog connector is intentionally malformed with wrong permissions to trigger Syslog permissions validation failure.

dataTypes.name: Syslog (SymantecProxySG)
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
SymantecProxySG
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

value:
SymantecProxySG
| summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
| project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(3d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions are required.
read permissions to shared keys for the workspace are required.

instructionSteps.title: 1. Install and onboard the agent for Linux
instructionSteps.description: Install the agent on the Server where the Symantec ProxySG logs are forwarded.

instructionSteps.title: 2. Configure the logs to be collected
instructionSteps.description: Configure the facilities you want to collect and their severities.
